zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Bulkeley於1215年11月9日出生在英國英格蘭爾南特維其時，他的父親William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley31歲，母親Beatrice Boteler26歲。他於1247年與Lady Jane le Boteler在英國英格蘭爾布爾可勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年在英國英格蘭爾布爾可勒享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Bulkeley was born on 9 November 1215, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley, was 31 and his mother, Beatrice Boteler, was 26. He married Lady Jane le Boteler in 1247, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1252, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Bulkeley est né le 9 novembre 1215, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Boteler, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane le Boteler en 1247, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1252, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Bulkeleyが1215年11月9日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeleyは31歳，母Beatrice Botelerは26歳であった。1247年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーでLady Jane le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Bulkeley(이)가 1215년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Boteler(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1247년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버켈리에서 Lady Jane le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버켈리에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Bulkeley родился 9 ноября 1215 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Boteler, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane le Boteler в 1247 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1252 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.
